shell: search, stage, review gate, apply
aurox -S: PKGBUILD review, streamed build, sudo gate
aurox -S repo package: pacman-parity fast path
whole-system upgrade: repo + AUR in one change set
Ctrl-C during a hung refresh bails to the prompt, not out of aurox
Ctrl-C aborts a hung repo-DB download instantly, then quits from the prompt
Ctrl-C at the idle prompt quits the shell (exit 130)
